artifacts.purpose: Quick visual scan of all 10 frames on mobile/tablet
Playable attack sequence at 12 FPS without loading individual frames
Annotated frames with articulation zones highlighted in red

review_guidance.focus: Perceptual articulation quality, not MAE metrics
questions: Is the draw motion visually apparent frame-to-frame?
Can you see the arm moving backward during frames 1-4?
Is the shoulder rotation subtle but visible?
Does the release snap (frame 5) feel distinct?
assessment_criteria: Visual motion is CLEAR and readable at board scale
Archer identity (face, hood, bow) is stable and recognizable
No visual artifacts, glitches, or distortion
Transition to/from idle is smooth without pops
Release frame (5) marks a clear timing beat
